questionHtml:
Which product is formed when CH3COCH2CH3 is reduced with sodium borohydride?


A.  CH3CH2CH2CHO

B.  CH3CH2CH2CH2OH

C.  CH3CH(OH)CH2CH3

D.  CH3CH2CH2COOH
